mnemonics: WILL: What Is Lost & Learned - A framework for evaluating automation's impact on human roles and skills.
keyPoints: Automation should augment human capabilities, not just replace them.
The goal is to design AI systems that are effective partners, fostering human-AI collaboration.
Ethical implementation requires considering the societal and economic impacts of automation on the workforce.
commonMistakes: Assuming full automation is always the most efficient or desirable outcome.
Focusing solely on technical performance while ignoring the human and social consequences.
